name: Efecto Doppler
description: Calcula la frecuencia observada debida al movimiento relativo.
seo_title: Efecto Doppler Gratuita – Rápido y Preciso
seo_description: Calcula la frecuencia observada debida al movimiento relativo. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Introduce tus valores y obtiene resultados.
example_label: Calculate observed frequency when source moves at 25 m/s toward observer moving at 10 m/s.
result_context: The observed frequency {f_obs} Hz changes due to relative motion between source and observer.
steps: Source frequency f₀ = 500 Hz, v_sound = 343 m/s
Source velocity vₛ = 25 m/s (toward observer, positive)
Observer velocity vₒ = 10 m/s (toward source, positive)
mistakes: Using wrong sign convention for velocities
Confusing source and observer velocity positions in formula
Not accounting for direction of motion (toward vs away)
